name: AliExpress
description: Global marketplace for budget-friendly products shipped from China. Electronics, clothing, home goods, and more.

name: Amazon
description: The world's largest online retailer. Shop millions of products with fast delivery, customer reviews, and Prime benefits.

name: CamelCamelCamel
description: Amazon price history tracker. See how a product's price has changed over time before buying. Set price alerts to get notified when items drop to your target.

name: eBay
description: Global online marketplace to buy and sell new, used, and vintage items through auction or fixed-price listings.

name: Etsy
description: Marketplace for handmade, vintage, and unique craft items. Support small creators and find one-of-a-kind gifts.

name: Honey
description: Browser extension that automatically finds and applies coupon codes at checkout. Backed by PayPal. Tracks price history and alerts you to drops.

name: Product Hunt
description: Daily leaderboard of the best new tech products, apps, and tools. Upvote, discuss, and discover what's launching in the startup world.

name: Skinport
description: Marketplace for buying and selling CS2 and other game skins at below-market prices. Secure escrow system, low fees, and instant payouts.

name: Takealot
description: South Africa's leading online store. Shop electronics, fashion, home goods, and more with local delivery.

name: Temu
description: Budget-friendly global shopping marketplace with a huge range of products shipped directly from manufacturers.

name: Amazon
description: The world's largest online marketplace. Millions of products with fast shipping, reviews, and price tracking.

name: AliExpress
description: Direct-from-manufacturer marketplace with extremely low prices. Huge selection, longer shipping times from China.

name: eBay
description: Online auction and marketplace for new and used goods. Bid, buy now, or sell your own items globally.

name: Etsy
description: Marketplace for handmade, vintage, and unique craft goods from independent sellers worldwide.

name: Walmart
description: Massive US retailer with online ordering, same-day pickup, and competitive prices across nearly every category.

name: Temu
description: Ultra-low-price marketplace shipping direct from manufacturers, similar to AliExpress with aggressive promotions.

name: Best Buy
description: Major US electronics retailer with in-store pickup, price matching, and a large open-box deals section.

name: StockX
description: Marketplace for sneakers, streetwear, and collectibles with authentication and live bid/ask pricing like a stock market.

name: Target
description: US retail chain with strong own-brand products, easy returns, and convenient same-day delivery options.

name: Depop
description: Peer-to-peer marketplace for secondhand and vintage fashion, popular with a younger, style-focused audience.
